heading: Documents and reports for foreign legations
label: 1717 Documents and reports for foreign legations
text: Documents and reports may be furnished to foreign legations to the United States upon request stating those desired and requisition upon the Director of the Government Publishing Office by the Secretary of State. Gratuitous distribution may only be made to legations whose Governments furnish to legations from the United States copies of their printed and legislative documents desired.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on 44 U.S. Code, 1964 ed., § 91 (, ).Jan. 12, 1895, ch. 23, § 7528 Stat. 620
Amendments2014— substituted “Director of the Government Publishing Office” for “Public Printer”.Pub. L. 113–235
